title: Finite Crank-Nicolson Method Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite Crank-Nicolson bad implicit-trapezoid step QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact rational Crank-Nicolson replay for y' = -y with h = 1/2 computes first next_state = 3/5, while a malformed row claims next_state = 1/2, isolating a compact scalar equality conflict for the Farkas route.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional implicit time-stepping rows only when they add distinct nonlinear stage solve, fixed-point iteration, stiffness, floating-point, or convergence-theorem pressure; keep general Crank-Nicolson stability and order theory in future Lean or numerical-honesty lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode the fixed ODE, step size, start/end derivatives, averaged slopes, implicit residuals, state updates, and monotone rational trace as deterministic rational replay obligations.
Route the false first Crank-Nicolson step through checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence after replay computes the exact implicit trapezoid next state.
Expose the pack through finite dynamics/time-stepping, numerical-analysis, real-analysis, and learner query surfaces.

Keep general Crank-Nicolson order, convergence, A-stability, stiffness behavior, nonlinear solves, adaptive methods, and floating-point time-stepping correctness marked as future Lean or numerical-honesty work until formal routes exist.
